Plot Gallery for Quic Implementation Benchmark

This page collects all published metric plots for the experiment 2026-03-25_03-39-45_850946-quic on node Overfit. The plots are generated from the enrichment manifests and published here as self-contained browser-friendly PNG galleries for reviewer inspection.
